headline: Tencent hits 21.5% share; Anthropic slides 2.6%
summary: Tencent's hy3-20260706:free reached an all-time token share of 21.5%, while Moonshot AI's kimi-k3-20260715 also set a record at 2.1%. Anthropic dropped 2.6 percentage points in a single day, its largest daily decline, as Zhipu AI and OpenAI each gained ground.
highlights: Moonshot AI kimi-k3-20260715: 2.1% share (all-time record, new entrant)
Market concentration (HHI) up 2.2 points in 30 days
